---
title: "about Brother Kay"
subtitle: "Data Science Portfolio"
# use quarto markdown to 
---

# Brother Kay at BYU-Idaho

![Link text](https://brightspotcdn.byui.edu/dims4/default/4a241c0/2147483647/strip/true/crop/1600x2000+0+0/resize/154x192!/format/webp/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fbyu-idaho-brightspot-production-us-east-2.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com%2F55%2F38%2F337d96ae4ce7920046c8fc3081e4%2Fkay-aaron-kaya-707606067.jpg)

## Title 2 Header

[MarkDown Basics](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/markdown-basics.html#links-images)
